summary: The interaction successfully transitions from the Command Settings view to the main menu Command Actions view upon clicking Back, but the actual before state shows incomplete rendering of settings sections compared to the expected wireframe.

correctStateChanges.expectedBefore: Visible with server, display, session, theme controls, Save Settings, Back buttons, and scrollbar
correctStateChanges.expectedAfter: Not visible, replaced by Command Actions view
correctStateChanges.actualBefore: Partially visible with server endpoint and visual palette, but missing display profile and UI scale
correctStateChanges.actualAfter: Not visible, replaced by Command Actions view
correctStateChanges.evidence: Actual after screenshot shows main menu with title, sector brief, and command actions buttons, matching expected after wireframe

correctStateChanges.expectedAfter: Visible with RiskyStars title, sector brief, command actions buttons (Multiplayer, Single Player, Tutorial Mode, Settings, Exit)
correctStateChanges.evidence: Transition from settings to main menu observed in actual screenshots
Frame persists in both actual before and after screenshots

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Visible in before state with resolution, window mode, UI scale controls
incorrectStateChanges.actual: Missing in actual before screenshot; large black space instead
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Actual before does not show the full settings content as per wireframe, indicating potential rendering or layout issue

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Visible in before state with palette, accent color, classic green, warning tone, amber
incorrectStateChanges.actual: Partially visible but incomplete; only label shown without controls
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Actual before screenshot shows truncated or missing details in visual palette section

incorrectStateChanges.expected: Scrollbar available and content scrollable to show all sections
incorrectStateChanges.actual: Scrollbar visible, but content appears incomplete or not fully rendered
incorrectStateChanges.whyIncorrect: Despite scrollbar, missing sections suggest content not properly loaded or screenshot not capturing scrolled state

wireframeSuitability.why: The wireframes accurately depict the expected before and after states for the transition, but lack annotations for dynamic elements like scrolling, which could help validate incomplete renderings in actual screenshots.
missingRequirements: No explicit validation for screenshot dimensions (TR-UI-INTERACTION-HWND-001) in wireframes
recommendedWireframeChanges: Add annotations indicating scrollable areas and full content extent
Include dimension labels to match technical requirements for screenshot size
